personality: rusher — tries to skip steps, answers 'whatever' and 'next'
backstory: Stress persona: tests whether the panel forces intake vs accepting vapor.
conversational_behaviors: First message may be only 'help' or 'ideas'
Says 'just tell me what to do' when asked for numbers

expected_answer_style.note: Panel should still ask for constraints before prescribing spend

r3_wrong_claim: Fine — I flip used furniture on Facebook Marketplace. Just tell me to run Facebook Ads already. That's obviously where my customers are. I need $5K/month in 60 days.
r4_contradiction: I should have said — I haven't actually sold anything yet. I was going to start. The photos I put up got views but zero messages.
